# Generated by Capy — x86_64 Linux (System V).
# Build:  gcc -nostdlib -static hello.s -o hello
.data
hello:
    .ascii "Hello, world\n"

.text
.global _start
_start:
mov $1, %rax              # syscall: write
mov $1, %rdi      # arg0: fd
lea hello(%rip), %rsi # arg1: buffer
mov $13, %rdx     # arg2: count
syscall
mov $60, %rax             # syscall: exit
mov $0, %rdi    # arg0: status code
syscall
